betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Introduction: Quantum Minecraft Dynamics§f

§aWelcome to QMD — quantum mechanics, particle physics, and exotic matter!§f
You have reached the frontier of high-energy physics in this modpack. Quantum Minecraft Dynamics (QMD) by lach_01298 unlocks subatomic particle accelerators, fusion-grade multiblocks, and antimatter containment.

§6Questline Stages§f:
§b• Stage 1 — Setup§f: Recover exotic byproducts (Tungsten, Titanium, Hafnium) via §bOre Leaching§f, and grow doped silicon semiconductors.
§b• Stage 2 — Linear Acceleration§f: Construct a §bLinear Accelerator (LINAC)§f plus §bTarget Chambers§f to produce P-doped silicon and early particle beams.
§b• Stage 3 — Ring Acceleration§f: Build circular §bSynchrotrons§f for GeV energy scales; route beams using §bBeam Splitters§f and §bBeam Diverters§f.
§b• Stage 4 — Quantum Endgame§f: Slow particles with §bDecelerators§f, trigger fusion in §bNucleosynthesis Chambers§f, and contain antimatter inside §bNeutral Exotic Containment§f fields.

§6Mod Identity§f:
QMD adds a wide array of particle types (protons, neutrons, electrons, muons, pions, alphas, etc.) that flow through beamline pipes, accelerators, and reaction chambers. Each particle carries §efocus§f, §eenergy§f, and §eintensity§f attributes that you can read with the §bBeam Meter§f tool.

§eTip§f: This quest is a checkbox — click to acknowledge and unlock the QMD questline. Then build a §bFission Reactor§f or §bFission Irradiator§f to begin the silicon doping chain.
